items.title: NFL to release regular-season schedule Thursday
items.summary: The NFL will release its complete regular-season schedule Thursday. The announcement made Friday is in line with the past couple of years, when the schedule has been released during the second week of May.

items.title: NFL, referees association ratify new 7-year CBA
items.summary: The NFL Referees Association ratified a new 7-year collective bargaining agreement with the NFL on Friday, eliminating the possibility of a work stoppage prior to the 2026 season.

items.title: Chicago Bears rookie Logan Jones to wear legendary No. 54 once worn by Brian Urlacher
items.summary: Second-round offensive lineman Logan Jones will wear No. 54 — the legendary number once made famous by Hall of Fame linebacker Brian Urlacher.  Urlacher wore the number throughout his storied career from 2000 to 2012, becoming one of the most recognizable defensive players in franchise history.  During his time in Chicago, Urlacher earned eight Pro Bowl selections, won the NFL Defensive Player of the Year award in 2005, and helped lead the Bears to Super Bowl XLI before eventually earning induction into the Pro Football Hall of Fame.
